participant_id.Description: Assigned identification number for a subject

sessions.Description: Number of sessions that the participant underwent

age.Description: Reported age of the participant at time of PET session 1

ses01_ses02_interval_days.Description: Number of days between PET session 01 and session 02 (if second session available)

mri-pet_ses01_interval_days.Description: Number of days between the MRI and PET session 01. Positive numbers indicate the MRI took place prior to the PET and vice versa.
